ddls:
CREATE TABLE "places" (
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the location belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  "natural_disaster_risk" TEXT /* Natural disaster risk level of the location (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "single_family_homes" (
  "home_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each single-family home record */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the homes are situated */,
  "number_of_homes" INTEGER /* Number of single-family homes in the location */,
  "insurance_premium" REAL /* Average insurance premium for single-family homes */,
  "average_home_value" REAL /* Average value of single-family homes in the location */,
  "construction_type" TEXT /* Type of construction (e.g., wood, brick, stone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_single_family_homes_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multi_family_homes" (
  "home_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multi-family home/condominium record */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the homes are situated */,
  "number_of_homes" INTEGER /* Number of multi-family homes/condominiums in the location */,
  "insurance_premium" REAL /* Average insurance premium for multi-family homes/condominiums */,
  "average_home_value" REAL /* Average value of multi-family homes/condominiums in the location */,
  "construction_type" TEXT /* Type of construction (e.g., wood, brick, stone) */,
  "number_of_units" INTEGER /* Number of units in the multi-family home/condominium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multi_family_homes_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance policy */,
  "home_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home record */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (single-family or multi-family) */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Amount of the insurance premium */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy expires */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Deductible amount for the policy */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Coverage limit for the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_policies_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_id") REFERENCES multi_family_homes ("home_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_policies_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_id") REFERENCES single_family_homes ("home_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy change record */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance policy */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., premium update, deductible change) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_changes_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES insurance_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policyholders" (
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policyholder */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance policy */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the policyholder */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the policyholder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the policyholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policyholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policyholders_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES insurance_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance claim */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policyholder */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance agent */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the insurance agent */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the insurance agent */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the agent operates in */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_agent_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy-agent assignment */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance policy */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance agent */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the agent was assigned to the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_agent_assignments_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_agent_assignments_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES insurance_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk assessment */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score (a numerical value representing the level of risk) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_renewals" (
  "renewal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy renewal record */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance policy */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was renewed */,
  "new_premium" REAL /* New premium amount after renewal */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_renewals_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES insurance_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
